content.content:
I found a matching event but need one quick confirmation before I make changes.

Found event:
- Title: "Dentist Appointment" (id: 5)
- Description: "Regular dental check-up."
- Current time: 2024-05-18 09:00 → 2024-05-18 10:00 (duration = 1 hour)
- Location: Downtown Dental Clinic
- Participants: emma.johnson@bluesparrowtech.com

Planned change: reschedule to start 2024-05-20 at 10:00 — keeping the same duration would make the new end time 2024-05-20 11:00.

Before I proceed I need you to confirm two things:
1) Is this the event you mean (the "Dentist Appointment" with description "Regular dental check-up")?  
2) What email address should I use for the clinic? (The event currently has no clinic email; if you give me the clinic email I will add it as a participant and then reschedule the event — the system will email both you and the clinic about the new time. If you prefer, I can reschedule first and then send a separate notification email to a clinic address you provide.)

Reply with confirmation and the clinic email (or tell me which option you prefer) and I’ll proceed.
